tribe_description:
They shop like constraint auditors, not feature collectors. Their core belief is that the real question isn’t whether a product can work in ideal conditions, but whether it can be used safely, predictably, and repeatedly inside the boundaries a normal person will actually keep—limited visibility, awkward angles, sensitive zones, rushed mornings, travel setups, and “I’m not risking my skin/eyes for marginal gains.” As a result, their reviews read less like enthusiasm or disappointment and more like an operational verdict: what the product can reliably do under a sane technique, and where the promise collapses when the situation gets precise.

They treat manufacturer instructions and advertised use cases as stress claims, not guidance. If the recommended workflow feels risky or requires perfect technique near high-consequence areas, they will deliberately choose a safer method and then grade the product on what’s achievable within that self-imposed safety boundary. They do not frame that as user error; they frame it as rational use. Weak results are often attributed to the constraint they refused to cross—because the constraint is the point—while the product is judged on whether it still delivers something worthwhile without gambling on harm.

This tribe also separates “the core device is competent” from “the precision task is inherently harder.” When precision-zone use turns out to be its own skill-and-handling problem (visibility, angle, grip, wrist contortions), they foreground that difficulty as the main truth instead of forcing the explanation into generic power complaints. They describe the learning curve and handling realities so other buyers don’t confuse a passable main-task performance with a guaranteed win in tight, contoured, or sensitive areas.

Their dealbreakers are mechanical and repeatable, not vibes. If an attachment that’s supposed to improve control instead creates interference—snagging, catching, blocked angles—they treat that as a functional failure mode worth naming, even if the base unit “works.” Likewise, they judge adjustable intensity by the low end: level 1 must be genuinely gentle and increments must be usable. “Level 1 already strong / level 2 too much” is, to them, a calibration defect because it breaks routine-safe controllability.

They validate big claims with pragmatic baselines and are comfortable concluding “no meaningful difference.” When the product is marketed as a replacement (especially cordless/travel tools), they apply a hard gate against a full-power reference and will explain the specific levers that cause regret (e.g., peak output plus geometry/time-throughput), not just “needs more passes.” And when everything is simply fine—no surprises, no failures—they will stop at an unqualified “works as expected” and cite only the few reliability signals they care about, because passing the controllability-and-repeatability gate is the whole story.

Value, for them, is a credibility test. They reject inflated or irrelevant premium anchors and argue fairness using concrete market references and personal baselines. If the price story feels manipulative, trust collapses and every other claim becomes harder for the product to earn back.
tribe_definition: A tribe of sensory-savvy pragmatists who take a practical, no-nonsense approach to buying and reviewing. They generally prioritize feel, scent, and sensory experience, informed judgment.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When writing a review, they build the verdict around decisive functional gates: can it be used safely and repeatedly, and does it deliver real output in the contexts it’s marketed for. If they hit a clear veto (unsafe handling, unusable calibration, mechanical interference, replacement claims that don’t survive a baseline), they lead with that first and then explain the concrete mechanism that makes the product non-repeatable. But when the experience is genuinely issue-free, they stop at an unqualified “works as expected/no issues” and mention only a small number of reliability signals they consider meaningful, rather than padding the review with speculative caveats or minor critiques.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps showed two consistent moves: (1) they don’t invent extra warnings or nitpicks when nothing went wrong, and (2) when they do go negative, the review organizes around the first functional veto and its mechanism; predictions over-assumed obligatory caveats in clean-pass cases (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When evaluating self-care items, they describe sensory cues (sting, pressure, residue, smell, heat feel) as operational signals of whether the product can fit into a repeatable routine. They translate sensations into consequences—too hot or too strong at low settings means poor control; greasy feel or lingering odor means it won’t be used daily. If the feel profile makes repeat use unlikely or increases risk, they treat that as functional failure rather than a mere preference mismatch.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: No new gap blocks contradicted this routine-compatibility framing, and the window’s emphasis on safe repeatability and low-setting behavior remains consistent with treating sensation as a constraint on adherence rather than enjoyment (LOW incremental evidence; retained baseline).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product touches sensitive areas or could cause harm, they treat safe-by-design and safe technique as non-negotiable, even if it limits results. If the manufacturer’s recommended workflow feels risky, they intentionally refuse that workflow and judge the product on what can be achieved within the safer method they’d actually repeat. In reviews they make that boundary explicit—what they would not do, why, and what outcome is realistically obtainable without gambling on damage—without adding unobserved hazard stories just to justify caution.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps reinforced that their central safety norm is boundary-based evaluation (safer-than-instructions use) and that they attribute weaker results to the chosen constraint rather than inventing extra hazard mechanisms; predictions added unmentioned dangers instead of honoring their “refusal is valid evidence” stance (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a listing leans on ingredients, materials, or safety claims, they treat specificity as a trust requirement—especially for sensitive or near-eye/skin use. They translate reassurance language into practical risk questions (daily use, reactive users, precision zones) and downgrade products that rely on vague comfort claims instead of clear constraints and details. If the claim-to-reality gap feels large, they frame it as a credibility breach that makes every other promise harder to believe.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: While not the primary focus of this window’s gaps, the repeated safety-first logic still implies that vague safety positioning isn’t neutral for them; it increases perceived risk and contaminates trust in other claims (MEDIUM).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When judging gadgets meant for hard-to-reach or precision areas, they treat those areas as a different task with different handling demands—not a scaled-down version of easy use. They test whether they can see the working area, maintain a safe angle, and operate without awkward grip changes, and they report the learning curve as part of the product truth. If the main takeaway is that precision-zone grooming/care is inherently less straightforward than the main task, they will foreground that reality instead of converting it into generic performance complaints just to create a cleaner defect narrative.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Multiple gaps showed they explicitly separate “core device works” from “precision-zone use is inherently harder,” and treat handling complexity as the key truth; predictions incorrectly forced that nuance into power/pass-count/attachment defect framing (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a product includes attachments or design add-ons meant to increase precision (guards, comb teeth, guides), they actively test whether those features improve control or create mechanical interference. They treat snagging, catching, blocked angles, and forced awkward grip as core defects because they reduce safety and repeatability in the exact contexts the add-on is supposed to help. In reviews, they often separate ‘the base device might be fine’ from ‘the accessory makes it fail in practice,’ and they emphasize the interference as an active, repeatable failure mode rather than simply saying they stopped using the accessory.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps included an accessory snag/catch that was framed as a repeatable mechanical failure that changes real usability; predictions minimized it into “just don’t use that part” guidance rather than capturing their norm that interference itself is the product truth (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When reviewing battery or portable devices, they treat output and efficiency as first-class metrics and benchmark them against a full-power baseline when the product is marketed as a replacement. They also separate endurance from capability: they can credit ‘several uses’ or ‘doesn’t chew through power’ even if results aren’t dramatic, because battery stability is a standalone trust signal. But if replacement marketing is implied, they diagnose the shortfall through specific levers (peak output plus geometry/throughput factors that stretch time-on-hair/skin), not just a vague ‘takes more passes.’
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps showed (a) endurance/efficiency can be praised cleanly, and (b) replacement-level evaluation is a hard gate explained with specific mechanisms (e.g., peak output and size/time throughput), which predictions collapsed into generic underperformance narratives (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When results are the main promise, they validate effectiveness with an explicit comparison setup rather than relying on vibes, and they document the setup even if it’s imperfect. They treat the comparison as a falsification attempt: it can prove ‘no huge difference’ just as legitimately as it can prove improvement. In reviews they attribute the outcome to the test context they chose (what was compared, how it was used), instead of automatically blaming device mechanics when the delta is small.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps showed they ran a concrete, somewhat messy but honest comparison and concluded no major delta; predictions assumed a more formal test or forced a device-fault explanation rather than respecting their context-attributed conclusion (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When a device offers intensity or settings, they judge quality by how gentle and controllable the low end is and how fine the increments feel in real use. They expect a truly subtle starting level and usable steps; if level 1 is already strong and the next step is ‘too much,’ they treat it as calibration failure rather than personal sensitivity or technique error. Their reviews concentrate on the first minutes and lowest settings because that’s where they decide whether the product can be safely repeated without bracing, flinching, or improvising workarounds.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps emphasized ultra-low-end controllability as the primary quality signal and treated coarse jumps as the central dealbreaker; predictions padded with extra context and narratives instead of reflecting their calibration-first justification (HIGH).

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: When judging whether something is ‘worth it,’ they anchor value in explicit reference comparisons and reject fuzzy premium narratives. They use concrete market ranges and call out pricing logic that tries to borrow legitimacy from irrelevant high-end anchors, treating that as a credibility problem rather than just annoying copy. In reviews, value becomes a fairness argument: what the buyer was led to expect at that price versus what the product measurably delivered under safe, repeatable use.
inherent_behavioral_traits.rationalization: Gaps reinforced their pattern of explicit anchor rejection and baseline comparisons as part of evaluation, while predictions avoided the fairness/credibility argument and reframed into generic “workable if you experiment” guidance (HIGH).

main.text: When choosing self-care products, they are motivated to avoid preventable harm and regret by establishing control early—especially in sensitive or precision contexts. They would rather accept weaker outcomes than adopt a workflow that feels risky, hard to repeat, or dependent on perfect technique. This drive is why they treat refusing a risky instructed method as a rational decision and then evaluate the product inside that safer boundary.
main.rationalization: Gaps showed the decisive frame was often ‘safe-by-choice’ workflow refusal, and they attributed outcomes to that boundary rather than just to device mechanics; predictions treated refusal as something needing extra hazard justification (HIGH).

main.text: When deciding what to believe about performance claims, they are motivated to ‘see the delta’ in a way that survives comparison, even if the comparison is pragmatic rather than laboratory-clean. They want evidence against a baseline and are comfortable recording ‘no meaningful difference’ as the honest outcome of a fair trial. This is why their reviews read like verification attempts that describe the comparison context, not like brand impressions.
main.rationalization: Gaps highlighted an explicit comparison setup leading to ‘no huge difference,’ and the divergence came from predictions assuming the test would prove success or that weak results must be a device flaw (HIGH).

main.text: When shopping in categories with wide price spreads, they are motivated to defend ‘fair value’ through argument, not gut feel. They don’t mind paying more, but they need the price story to hold up against real alternatives and against inflated marketing anchors. If pricing logic feels manipulative, it reduces trust in all other claims.
main.rationalization: Gaps show explicit rejection of premium anchoring and expectation-breach framing, indicating value protection is a central motivation rather than generic frugality (HIGH).

main.text: When buying portable or battery-powered tools, they are motivated by efficiency and capability—getting usable output without draining power, extending sessions, or requiring repeated passes. Convenience only counts if it doesn’t force a competence downgrade versus their baseline expectations, but they still credit endurance and power-stability as its own form of reliability. This is why they can praise ‘several uses’ or ‘doesn’t chew through power’ even while remaining ambivalent about peak results.
main.rationalization: Gaps showed they used efficiency/endurance as a trust signal and separated it from capability complaints; predictions collapsed these into an assumed battery-drain narrative or over-conditionalized the praise (HIGH).

main.text: When leaving reviews, they are motivated to reduce uncertainty for other shoppers by translating products into operational rules: what the safe method is, where handling becomes its own task, and which limits are structural rather than optional. They see ‘helpfulness’ as preventing others from repeating a risky workflow or misunderstanding a precision task as straightforward. But when their experience is clean and uneventful, they don’t feel obligated to manufacture warnings—because the most helpful update is that nothing demanded special management.
main.rationalization: Gaps showed both sides of their helpfulness norm: they foreground task complexity and safety boundaries when real, yet they also stop at a plain “works as expected” when issue-free rather than appending predicted caveats (MEDIUM→HIGH in this window due to repeated clean-pass divergence).

main.text: When evaluating sensory aspects (scent/texture/feel), they are motivated to build routines they can maintain daily without discomfort or aversion. Pleasant feel matters mainly as a predictor of adherence and secondary problems (residue, greasiness, irritation) that make a product incompatible with their life. This is why sensory notes are framed as practical constraints.
main.rationalization: No new gap blocks added detail here, but the tribe’s repeatability-first orientation remains consistent with treating sensory impressions as routine-compatibility signals (LOW incremental evidence; keep baseline).

implicit_goals.text: When assembling their routine, they aim to standardize on tools that are safe, controllable, and repeatable in the real contexts they’ll actually use them—especially precision and sensitive areas. They want devices whose lowest settings and default handling feel predictable from the first session, without requiring a risky workflow to get acceptable results. Their reviews function as a reality-check: what the safe method is, how steep the learning curve is in precision zones, and whether the tool stays controllable under those constraints.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Gaps emphasized (1) precision use as a different task with a real handling boundary and (2) safety-driven refusal of risky instructed workflows; together these show the goal is repeatable control under real-use constraints, not peak outcomes (HIGH).

implicit_goals.text: When spending on gadgets or higher-priced items, they aim to justify the purchase with comparison-proof evidence: a measurable delta versus what they already own and a price argument that survives market references. They want to feel they paid for capability, not implied premium status, and they accept ‘no meaningful difference’ as a valid conclusion if the comparison doesn’t show a clear win. Their reviews either document that justification or serve as a warning when the value story collapses under testing.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Gap blocks showed explicit comparison setups leading to ‘no huge difference’ and reinforced their price-credibility auditing; the outcome they seek is defensible justification, not optimism (HIGH).

implicit_goals.text: When choosing portable or battery-powered options, they aim to buy convenience without unknowingly trading away capability. They want to know two separate truths: whether the device can do the job to their baseline standard, and whether the battery behavior is efficient and stable across multiple uses. Their reviews clarify whether portability is a true upgrade, a tolerated compromise, or simply a mismatch to the job as marketed—and they explain the concrete reason when replacement claims fail.
implicit_goals.rationalization: Gaps showed they credit endurance separately while holding replacement claims to a mechanism-explained baseline; predictions flattened this into generic ‘more passes’ without the specific levers they use to classify portability as mismatch vs compromise (HIGH).

Their motivation is to share experiential insight so fellow shoppers can achieve the same soft, irritation-free results they value.

I love this product. I now use it after I shower and I can't believe I've not been using it before. It's the perfect cap for a shower. My skin is so soft and silky after I shower like never before. I wish it was a little more within my budget though. I really truly like the luxurious experience and so if it were I would be purchasing more.

AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.product_description: ViviDreamore Satin Bonnet Silk Bonnet for Sleeping Silk Sleep Cap Hair Bonnet for Sleeping Bonnets for Women Curly Natural Braid Hair Bonnet for Men Adjustable Wide Band Double Layer(Brown)
AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.review_text:
This review is for ViviDreamore Satin Bonnet Silk Bonnet for Sleeping Silk Sleep Cap Hair Bonnet for Sleeping.

This is the perfect bonnet because unlike the others it's adjustable. There's a big black belt sewn inside that you use to adjust it to whatever size you want. It can be loose and comfortable if that's the way you adjust it and it won't slip off, even while you're sleeping, it's still the perfect fit. I have a million of these bonnets and they're now way too loose after minimal wear only because you can't adjust them the way you can this one.

AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.product_description: AIIR Diamond Shampoo - Fragrance Free Shampoo for Color Treated Hair, Sulfate Free Shampoo, Organic Shampoo - Cleansing and Moisturizing Color Safe Shampoo, Hair Repair - 8 oz
AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.review_text:
This review is for AIIR Diamond Shampoo - Fragrance Free Shampoo - Shampoo for Color Treated Hair.

This shampoo cleanses superbly and softens nicely. I wish it wasn't fragrance free though. I personally like a little fragrance with my shampoo experience. I also love the way my hair smells afterwards. It's nice and it does clean well but I wish they'd consider making a similar product that's scented with jasmine or lavender.

AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.product_description: VALITIC Foot Peel Mask for Dry Cracked Feet and Dead Skin Callus Removal - Vitamin E & A Aloe Vera Collagen Moisturizing Natural Korean Complex - Extra Strength - Men and Women 3 Pairs - Lavender
AEHTPCFFRZYADDJ6LUHMWN5R2PRA.review_text:
This review is for VALITIC Foot Peel Mask for Dry Cracked Feet and Dead Skin.

I actually love this product. I have rough dry feet and I've been searching for years for the right product. After using this my feet are softer and they look much better. The dead skin came off really well after use. My feet look okay enough to wear sandals now. I'm using a good moisturizer which helps the results last.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Sasy n Savy, Citrus Soufflè Hydrating and Nourishing Body Crème, Plant-Based Natural Ingredients For Daily Moisture, 6.08 fl oz(180mL)
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This is a nice body moisturizer that softens and hydrates your skin.  It absorbs well and has a nice scent.  The moisturizing effect isn't as long-lasting as I would like, but it's still a good lotion.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Crystalline sea salt scrub smoothes while softening skin with rich, supple moisture. Suspended in a base of silky sunflower and apricot oils, this emollient sea salt scrub buffs away bumps and flakes to reveal glowing, rejuvenated skin.
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This is a good body scrub that exfoliates plus moisturizes your skin.  It also smells great.  Although it contains oils, it doesn't leave your skin excessively oily once you rinse it off.  It just leaves your skin soft and smooth.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: GreenIVe Handcrafted Neem Bar Soap, Small Handmade Batches, Moisturize and Cleanse (1 Pack)
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This soap is very nice.  It lathers up well and doesn't strip your skin of moisture.  It also smells great and doesn't have a lot of synthetic perfume.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Blended with tea tree oil and cranberry seed, there is an air of strength and confidence with every application. With active ingredients, this rejuvenating treatment defines miraculous development and improvement in skin texture, resilience and appearance.
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This body scrub does a nice job of both exfoliating and moisturizing.  It also smells great.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: The Essential Oil Towelettes from Herban Essentials combines clean hands with soothing scents. Our travel hand wipes work to keep your hands clean and skin soft. They also work as face cleansing wipes, face cloths, body wipes for adults bathing, and body wipes for men when you are traveling and cannot stop to take a shower. If you need a midday refresher, use one of our citrus moisture towelettes for an energizing pick-me-up! Our collection includes lemon wipes, facial wipes cleansing cloths, a natural towelette, and men's wipes.
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: These towelettes are great for keeping in your car's glove compartment, putting inside your tote bag, or stashing away in your office desk.  They're very handy for times when you can't get to a sink and use soap and water.  They also smell great.  They're a little pricey for everyday use, so I took off one star for that.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Sibu NotOr Omega 7 Sea Buckthorn Oil Soft Gels, Anytime Face Wash, Facial Defense Oil, Skin Cleansing, Skin Moisturizing Core Kit
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This is a very nice set of sea buckthorn oil products.  Sea buckthorn helps with a variety of skin problems.  My main issue is age spots.  The topical products help right away, by softening and moisturizing your skin as well as reducing any redness or discoloration.  The soft gels help long-term by repairing from within.  I think it's a great idea to have an entire set of products packaged all together.  It's nice not only for yourself, but would make a great gift for somebody this holiday season.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Mirror Flower Nail Clippers Set 2Pcs, No Splash Nail Clippers for Fingernail and Toenail, Medical Grade Stainless Steel, Sharp Stainless Steel Flat/Oblique Nail Clipper, Trimmer Set for Men and Women
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: These nail clippers are decent quality and do a good job of cutting/clipping your nails.  One of them is for clipping your fingernails, and the other for toenails.  They both work well and I have no complaints.

AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.product_description: Little Moon Essentials Floral Bath & Shower Sugar Exfoliant, Relax, 2 oz.
AEE4M36AZAKURLEYGV23TM3BE7OQ.review_text: This is a pretty good body scrub that exfoliates your skin and leaves it soft and moisturized.  It's a little pricey for everyday use, so I took off one star for that.

AETAGDPMO4CFZBXNG7W25DJTRUOQ.product_description: Aozzy Bath Bombs Gift Set for Women Relaxing, Organic Bath Bombs with Enchanting Scents and Rainbow Colors, Bath Bomb Set with Pure Essential Oils for Normal/Dry Skin, Easter Gift, Mothers Day Gift
AETAGDPMO4CFZBXNG7W25DJTRUOQ.review_text: I love bath bombs and these are great value.  They're no especially large but they dissolve quickly with a satisfying amount of fizz.  They'd make a perfect gift but I kept them for myself.  I honestly couldn't tell one scent from another with these but none of them had an offensive strong odour.  Unlike a lot of bath bombs they don't leave your skin feeling dry and they didn't stain my bath tub or towels.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: By Terry Hyaluronic Pressed Hydra-Powder | Transcluscent | Infused with Hyaluronic Acid | Vegan
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: This is a must have for your purse in the summer months. Really takes away the shine. It's a compact with a mirror and it will last a long time. I had some shine on my face from my sunscreen and this fixed it right up and didn't effect my sunscreen protection.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Peripera Ink Mood Matte Lipstick, Lightweight, Matte, Smooth, Hydrating, Lasting Color Payoff (02 Pink Go Up)
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: In the colder weather my lips get really pale but most lipsticks I try don't look natural enough for daily wear. This one is different. It's matte so it looks more natural and the color is gorgeous. It lasted about 4 hours before needing to reapply so that would be my only complaint but overall it's great.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Summer Crystal Straw Hat Girl Alligator Hair Clip (Valentine Rose)
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: This hat hair clip is so cute!! It holds in the hair well and is perfect for a sundress accessory. Well made - good quality!

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Fishdown 4Pcs Hair Bun Maker Women Hair Bun Shaper Accessories Classy Multicolor Cloth Magic Clip Girls Hairstyle Must-haves Tool
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: So I really like the concept of this and it's super quick and easy to use in my daughter's hair but it's definitely better for adults. It's rather large and ended up falling out of my daughter's hair after a few hours. She does have long hair so I thought it would work for her but I definitely want to see if I can find this in a smaller size.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: hominem Face and Beard Serum from Manilla Natural Skincare
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: This beard and face oil has a sweet smell that is hard for me to place. I do like the scent but I can't think of anything to compare it to. The oil came wrapped in bubble wrap and in a zip lock style small bag but it wasn't sealed so that is really my only complaint. Other than that the oil moisturized skin well and it didn't leak at all in shipping process.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: UJM Magnetic Eyelashes 10 Pairs Reusable Magnetic Eyelash and Eyeliner Kit Natural Look False Lashes with Tweezers No Glue Needed Waterproof Magnetic Lashes
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: This was my first time ever putting on fake lashes of any kind so any issues I had may have been operator error. I'm not the best at liquid eyeliner so some dripped in my eye which wasn't super fun. After the eyeliner dried the lashes stuck to it great! Fake eyelashes feel weird on but again I am new to it. They looked great though.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: EASYDEW Fill Up Volume Spot 0.67 fl oz -Anti-Aging Filler Spot Good for Topical Wrinkle Care with Hyaluronic Acid I Moisturizer with Instant Filling Effect and Skin Renewal | For Topical Area
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I've used for 3 days now and haven't noticed any difference. It might work after a longer period of use. That being said, I have sensitive skin and didn't have any bad reactions to this and a little bit does go a long way.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Panama Jack Sunscreen Lip Balm - SPF 45, Tropical & Mango 6 Pack Plus, Broad Spectrum UVA-UVB Sunscreen Protection, Prevents & Soothes Dry, Chapped Lips
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I have sensitive lips so I tend to only use nivea lip gloss but I wanted something with better sun protection. This one didn't cause my lips to get itchy or dry and goes on very smooth. There is hardly any scent to it and no flavor except for a slight sunscreen taste. Overall I like it because it provided great sun protection.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Avajar Perfect V Lifting Premium Eye Mask 5 Sets(10 Pairs) - Under Eye Collagen Patch | Hydrogel Anti Aging Mask for Puffy Eyes & Bags, Dark Circles and Wrinkles | Elasticity Improvement Pad
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I was surprised when the instructions said to leave these on for 1 to 2 hours as I am used to other under eye patches only being on for 20 mins. I had the patches on for 1 hour and 25 mins. It had a slightly cool feeling the whole time it was on. I have sensitive skin and had no adverse reaction to it. I was impressed that my eye puffiness was visibly reduced.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Reusable Cotton Swab Portable Silicone Swab Washable Cotton Swabs for Ear Cleaning Beauty Treatment Makeup Cotton Swab
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I love these silicone "cotton swabs"!! I personally have a problem with the feeling of cotton balls and cotton swabs but they are useful. I didn't even realize something like this existed so I was super excited to try it out. I used it for touching up makeup and they are really easy to use and clean. It comes with different textured heads too so it's very versatile.

This mask looks pretty terrifying when on but it does a fantastic job of soothing the skin. My skin is very pale and gets sections of redness easily and when I woke up this morning I had no red sections and my skin was really hydrated. It did leave my skin a bit oily looking but I used an oil paper to pull that out and my skin looked great after that.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: This luxurious hydrogel patch tackles the major signs of dark circles, puffiness, fine lines, and wrinkles for a glowing, revitalized appearance. Elevated by the power of Pure Gold to strengthen elastin, fight free radicals and stimulate blood flow achieving the ultimate level of radiance. Benefits: + Revitalizes and clarifies the under eye for a radiant glow + Helps to reverse the appearance of sun damage and age spots for an even complexion + Fights free radicals and protects against environmental aggressors Hero Ingredients Pure Gold An ingredient rumoured to be used in Cleopatra’s skincare routine, gold is revitalizing and clarifying. Known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, the precious metal strengthens elastin, fights free radicals and stimulates blood flow for a firm, even, and radiant complexion. Niacinamide A form of vitamin B3, this skin-restoring ingredient minimizes the appearance of pores, uneven skin tone and wrinkles while maximizing skin radiance and glow. Royal Jelly Extract This honey bee secretion filled with vitamins A, E, C and B and protective immune proteins, defends against free radicals and environmental stressors that cause premature cell aging, and is responsible for a young bee developing into a queen bee. Details Hero Ingredients: Pure Gold, Niacinamide and Royal Jelly Extract Ideal for these Concerns: dark circles, puffiness, fine lines and wrinkles Preferences: Cruelty-free, Sulfate-free Application Area: Under Eyes How to use: After cleansing, use toner to create a smooth skin base. Open package, remove supporter and place the mask on the outer corners to fit the eye shape. After 10-20 minutes, peel the mask off and lightly dab the remaining essence left on your skin. Full ingredient list Disclaimer: Ingredients are subject to change at the manufacturer's discretion. For the most complete and up-to-date list of ingredients, refer to the product packaging.) Disclaimer:Ingredients are subject to change at the manufacturer’s discretion. Actual packaging may vary, for the complete and up-to-date ingredients, refer to the product packaging. Please read labels, warnings and directions before use.
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I only got a 1 pack so it may take a lot longer to see any results. I have used gold under eye masks before and this one wasn't as good. I like to put them in the refrigerator for a nice cooling effect when I wake up in morning and usually the cool feeling lasts 10 mins but with these after a minute it wasn't cool anymore. My eyes didnt look any brighter underneath after wearing for 20 mins. They do feel more moisturized so I gave 3 stars because of that.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: DmHirmg Strap Extenders,All-in-One Kit with Strap Extender and Facemasks Bracket, Bracket Inner Support Frame Ear Pain Relieved Ear Strap and More Space for Breathing 10Pack (10) â€¦
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: The ear savers are great! Soft, flexible and comfortable all while holding the mask on well. I was a little disappointed in the mask bracket as it was a bit too small for my face. It does make it easier to breath but because of the size it moved around when I talked. 5 stars for mask extenders, 3 stars for bracket.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Heated Eyelash Curler, USB Rechargeable Electric Eyelash Curler for Quick Natural Curling, Portable Eyelash Curler Long Lasting Eyelash Curler with Temperature Gears Digital Display (champaign gold)
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: The curler is easy to use but I didnt feel like it made a huge difference. In the photo I showed one eye curled with mascara and the other with nothing and no curl. I did not do it the way the instructions said (which was mascara and than curl) because I read somewhere else that you can damage your eyelashes if you use mascara before the curler. This may be why my results weren't great however I don't want to damage my eyelashes.

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: Longer Mask Extender Strap Mask Holder Mask Extender, Mask Extender Comfortable Ear Strap Hook,Large Size (Black+Gray+White)
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I've tried at least 5 other strap extenders for my masks and this is my favorite! The extender is super flexible which makes it really comfortable to wear and the mask stays on the loop great!

AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.product_description: zelaxy Mask Strap Extenders, Soft Silicone Mask Holders for Relieve Ear Pain Caused by Mask (Thumb)
AEFRTLVCVRALKXBED77KHPIXEPWQ.review_text: I use this with the masks I have where the elastic is too long and I really like it. Mask stays on the ear saver well. The silicon is soft so it's more comfortable on the back of my head.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: I must say this stuff does an excellent job on tile grout,  with a lot less elbow grease!  My only gripe would be the translation to English from Chinese---really poor!  The review is however, for the product and not grammar or spelling.  In the past we have had tiled shower and tub enclosures, what a pain to keep clean, wish this was available then!  Very pleased with this product.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: Florona Hibiscus Air Freshener Room Spray for Deep Sleep 100 ml - Pure & Unrefined Pillow Mist & Linen Spray (Hibiscus,100 ml)
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: I was curious about the Hibiscus scent.  We're all familiar with other stronger scents like rose, or gardenia, and etc., but this one is more obscure.  Well, it's different, interesting, with a subtle but deep aroma, that actually is quite nice.  I spritzed some mist on our bedding about an hour before bedtime, and later the slight delicate fragrance was there in a relaxing sort of way.  Not powerful or too flowery for the guys, but a nice calm fresh and peaceful scent that was only minimally noticeable.  The spray has only 3 ingredients listed: water, hibiscus oil, castor oil, - no chemicals, so looks to be pretty pure, and it comes in a clear plastic bottle with plastic pump.  A good alternative to some of those annoying strong scents in a can.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: SHIONLE - Semi Matte Air Lipstick: Creamy semi matte lipstick | Long Lasting | Great Coverage | Creamy Texture | 03 FLAMINGO PINK | 3.3g
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: Disappointed!  The lipstick arrived today and I immediately opened and noticed there was no pink caste for the color #03 - Pink Flamingo.  It's more of an light coral/orangey shade, more subtle that a distinct orange, but still no pink.  Thought I'd try it out anyway, hoping once on my lips some pink might appear and show through.  Well, the only thing that showed through was my lips!  That's not what I wanted!  My lips are pretty much wrinkled with lines, and it was obvious that this new lipstick was not going to fill-in on the lips and look good.  In fact, my lips look very dry and raggedy wearing this lipstick, kind of a hit or miss look.  The box says semi-matte air lipstick.  Finally just wiped off the lipstick =  a no - go for me.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: Movo Matte Liquid Foundation and Makeup Sponge Set – 5 Shades Medium Coverage Lightweight Feel Liquid Foundation for Combination / Oily Skin, Flawless Natural Look with Matte Finish 1.0 oz (#2 Natural)
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: Boy, did I get lucky!  I picked the perfect color (#2 Natural) for my complexion.  This Movo Matte Liquid Makeup is very nice and easy to apply, especially with the included Makeup Sponge.  I used both this morning applying over my moisturizer, and it smoothed on perfectly.  The appearance looks "natural" and even covers those slight blemishes, and feels comfortable on my face and neck!  It has a matte finish that looks great, but also has suppleness and moisture instead of looking flaky and dry.  Glad to try this wonderful product.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: DOYIZZ Makeup Brushes Set, 10pcs Crystal Handle Makeup Brushes Powder Blush Brush Foundation Brush Blending Eye shadow Concealer Makeup Brush Set (Pink)
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: I needed some new cosmetic Brushes!  My current ones were very shop-worn and ratty-looking.  Even after washing they were not worth keeping any longer.  This lovely DOYIZZ Makeup Brush Set is just what I needed.  There are 10 brushes of varied sizes, though I'll be using the "big 4" fluffy ones the most.  Fluffy is the word for these!  They are super fluffy, and so soft, and feel really good when applying my blush, bronzer, highlighter, or powder.  The smaller brushes are great for any eye shadows, and etc.  Did I mention how pretty and girly-girl this set is?  The business end - soft fluffy brushes, is a lovely shade of light pink, as is the metal attached to the handles, and the handles.....oh! the handles - they are a gorgeous and sparkly Faceted Crystal pink tinted clear plastic that's easy to handle when using. Makes me smile - a bright spot to my morning.  All in all, a very efficient, attractive, and useful Set!

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: 2 Pack Soy Candles Gifts Set for Women, Lavender, Fir Scent, Hand Poured Aromatherapy Candle, Scented with Essential Oils, Each 8 oz
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: This 2-pack of Natural Amor Candles is a real treasure.  The scents are wonderful and relaxing, reminiscent of walking through a forest or field and breathing in "nature".  The candles are made of 100% Soy wax (the best) and scented with natural Essential Oils of Lavender and Balsam Fir.  What's nice about these is the subtleness of the fragrances, but yet, still very aromatic - no sweet flowery smell, just nature!  The candles come in very substantial round metal tins and lids, about 2 1/4" high, and 3" across.  Each candle has 2 wicks sticking up out of the creamy white wax.  These together or separate would make a nice gift for anyone that would enjoy an alternative to a floral aromatherapy.....a very nice and different, calming experience.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: Simply Dana Cellular De-Stressing Cream, Boost Skin's Natural Immunity - 1 oz (30g)
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: This Simply Dana is referred to as a De-Stressing Cream.  I don't think my skin is stressed, but thought it still might be worthwhile. For now, I'm not going out in the world to submit my body to any skin-stressing stuff in the air.  So far, I used the very nice cream at bedtime, and in the morning before applying my makeup.  I really like it under my makeup.  The pure white lightweight moisturizing cream spreads easily and soaks in fast, leaving my face and neck feeling ready for anything (perhaps it's coating is boosting my skin's natural immunity = protection).  There is no stickiness, no sheen, no oiliness, and no noticeable coating, just a comfortable feeling like there's nothing there except a clean face ready for the day.  The 1 oz. container is a frosted glass with a subtle light grayish silver plastic lid.  There is a slight scent that is not objectionable, and doesn't last.  (On the bottom is the expiration date of 6/2021 - not a lot of time - this is 1/2021)  The ingredients appear to be similar to a lot of other products used in cosmetics.  Listing a few: Safflower oil - good for acne, eczema, and healthy skin; Silicone - helps product glide smoothly and easily; Squalane - an emollient and moisturizer, good for hydrating the skin; Chamomile (wild) - for the scent, not much.

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: Organic Sweet Almond Oil and Fractionated Coconut Oil Bundle for Hair and Skin, 100% Pure and Natural, Hexane-Free, Moisturizing, For Healthy Skin, Silky Hair, Multiuse Body Oil, 16 fl. Oz X 2
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: These two Oils are just what I've been wanting.  I've purchased everything I need to set up some nice Reed Diffusers with Essential Oils.  Everything except some carrier oils to mix with the E Os.  Fractionated Coconut, and Sweet Almond Oils seem to be the preferred carrier oils, and they're Organic.  These two oils from Shiny Leaf are pure and natural, refined and lightweight, and perfect for my use.  They are in liquid form and clear.  Of course, these Oils are also wonderful for therapeutic use for a great massage therapy, and for a moisturizer for skin or hair.  There's plenty in these 16 fl. oz. bottles to try everything.  What fun!

AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.product_description: Bodyguard Moisturizing Immunity Soap 6pk | 7 Essential Oils Clinically Evaluated to Boost Immunity and Protect | Moisturizes with Sweet Almond Oil | Healthy PH for Skin Microbiome
AGRO3UTLKTF724ZW64QXGWXJ4SYA.review_text: This soap is different.  Can't make up my mind - like or dislike.  It's a very unique soap, as it's hand made (in Ohio) using some interesting ingredients that one would find in their kitchen.  Ingredients that are made into Essential Oils that are blended with other stuff to create this soap.  The scent is really strange, it's spicy, herby, woodsy, and lingering...hard to pinpoint or explain.  There are 6 little soaps in a package, and are a modernized teardrop shape, a shield design, making it easy to hold while using.  The soap actually produces a good amount of a creamy, sudsy lather, and leaves the skin very clean and soft with a nice amount of moisture.  They say it's good for immunity support with the special natural oils, but all I know is it's a great cleaning soap that has a very distinctive and potent scent.

AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.product_description: Perfect Reflection Face Brightening Moisturizer-Organic-Kojic acid-Alpha-arbutin-Niacinamide-Mulberry
Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil Pure Butter infused with Tea Tree Oil, 4 Oz
AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.review_text: I like this. It is very moisturizing the smell is ok. I like the creamy solid texture.

AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.product_description: Mocossmy Cross Nail Art Charms Decoration,72 PCS Gold Silver 3D Mini Metal Punk Vintage Cross Designs Mixed Types Retro Acrylic Nail Jewelry Accessories for Women Girls DIY Manicure Crafts Decoration
AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.review_text: These are good quality charms. I like the weight of them and they are high quality. They were very easy to apply.

AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.product_description: Crystalline sea salt scrub smoothes while softening skin with rich, supple moisture. Suspended in a base of silky sunflower and apricot oils, this emollient sea salt scrub buffs away bumps and flakes to reveal glowing, rejuvenated skin.
AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.review_text: This scrub works great it’s very moisturizing.The granules are on the bigger side.It has a coconut scent that dries down to a very light hint of a fragrance after awhile.The hydrating effect last long.

AERQA5ZYAYFVERYQIV6BW4K6KGPQ.product_description: AliPearl Hair Wig Highlight Grey Body Wave Lace Front Closure Wigs Human Hair Platinum Blonde Highlight Wig Brazilian Body Wave 4x4 Lace Closure Wigs Pre Plucked Human Hair Wigs For Black Woman 24 Inch

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: Natural Makeup Removing Wipes (42 Count) by Ducalm Skincare - Infused with Lavender, Sunflower and Jojoba - Gentle Towelette to Remove Resistant Makeup and Dirt - Alcohol and Paraben Free, 3pk
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text: This came in 3 boxes of 14 wipes. They are each individually wrapped. They have a light scent and work well to remove makeup. I appreciate this product being vegan and biodegradable. I would definitely buy this again.

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: Prairie Rose Organics Cocoa Butter Cream Peppermint Body Butter - Mint Cocoa Whipped Body Cream
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text: I have been using this all week and it’s the perfect holiday lotion. It smells so yummy. It keeps me moisturized and skin feeling soft. I appreciate the clean ingredients as well. The price is fair for this product. If you need a new lotion I would check this out!

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: Silk Exfoliating Mitt,Deep Exfoliating Mitt Body Scrub And Face Scrub,Dead Skin Removal Smooth Skin And Keratosis Pilaris Treatment
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text: Honestly, this is just ok. It doesn’t do a whole lot since it isn’t rough. I was looking for something that would better exfoliate. Definitely overpriced. I wouldn’t buy it again.

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: NIRA Skincare Laser & Serum Bundle - Includes Anti-Aging Laser & Hyaluronic Acid Serum - Reduces Appearance of Fine Lines & Wrinkles - FDA Cleared
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text:
I have been using this device for a full three months. I can honestly say that I don’t think it’s made a whole lot of difference in my under eye area.

The device is easy to use and has different levels. It holds a charge very well. Occasionally I would get a little “zap” but it wasn’t anything super painful.

This device is pretty expensive. Weighing the cost versus the results, I personally wouldn’t buy this again.

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: KoluaWax Wax Strips for Hair Removal on Arms, Legs, Underarm, Eyebrow, Bikini Line, and Brazilian - Contains 40 Ready To Use Waxing Strips
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text:
These are pretty solid wax strips. I probably wouldn’t use them on the bikini area but they’re fine for legs.

Has a bit of an unpleasant smell. Easy to use. I heat them up with a blow dryer for a few seconds then stick on my legs and pull. Also comes with an oil cloth to remove any leftover wax.

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: STARAMZ 7 Set Bachelorette Scrunchies Bridesmaid Proposal Gifts Hair Ties for Women Bachelorette Party Favors ( Blush)
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text: These are very cute scrunchies for a bridesmaid gift. The pack comes with 6 pink and 1 white. It’s a shiny material and looks pretty. These would be great in a proposal box or for the wedding.

AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.product_description: REALHER Cheek Trio - Ultimate Glow Getter - Blush, Highlighter, & Bronzer Contour Palette - High Quality, Silky Formulation
AFESFBY7EYJMQNKR572SZFAAET5Q.review_text: This is a very pretty contour kit. It has a blush color, hi lighter and a darker contour color. I like that the packaging isn’t huge which makes it good for travel. The colors are very pretty and they last on my face all day. I would buy this again.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: Shower Steamers - Aromatherapy Shower Bombs with Pure Essential Oils for Home Spa Relaxation. Bath Steamer Gift Set for Lovers, Wife, Moms, Christmas Birthday Mothers' Valentines' Day
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text:
I'm a shower kinda gal, but that means I don't use the luxury, nice-smelling products available for baths. These sounded like they would add a little decadence to mundane showers. Good theory. Too bad it didn't work.

I admit to using only one of these so far, the lavender one. It is not supposed to get TOO wet so I put it in the front corner of my shower. In that location, it didn't get wet enough to work. So I put it in a back corner. There is got some water, and more if I turned. I could tell it was working because there was a lavender colored stream of product going down the drain. And I could hear it fizzing. But I couldn't smell it. Even when I bent down close to it, it had almost no scent, certainly not the steamy spa effect. My shower is glass enclosed, so it's not like all the scent was escaping through an open door or light shower curtain.

Although this is a nice idea, and would have been good for a gift if it worked, for me it was a bust.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: Enviroscent Non-Toxic Room & Home Spray (3-Piece Set) Air Freshener (Lemon Leaf + Thyme) Infused with Essential Oils | 1 Spritz Trigger & 2 Refillable Bottles
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text:
I love the scent of this lemon leaf and thyme spray. It's refreshing and not floral, not cloyingly sweet. I also really like the simple aluminum (recyclable) bottle that comes with a simple plastic (not recyclable) trigger in the starter kit. The scent contains essential oils, but there is no list of ingredients so I don't know what else is in there. Probably a lot of water. The scent is not quite as strong as I would like for a big room, nor does it last as long, but the pros outweigh the cons.

The aluminum cans are supposed to be refillable, but I couldn't find any refills on Amazon at the time of this review. However, I could find them on the company's product page. I think you could probably find a DIY recipe for making your own, but I doubt I could make anything that smells as nice as this lemon leaf and thyme combination.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: Keto Bars - Low Carb, Keto Diet Snacks. Net Carbs Only 3g. Dairy-Free (Vegan), Raw, Gluten-Free. Paleo Friendly. No Sugar Alcohols. No Stevia. 6 Bars Ginger - Nutmeg + 6 Chocolate - Vanilla.
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text:
I liked the taste of the chocolate bar quite a bit. The ginger-nutmeg one was okay but not as flavorful to me even though I love both ginger and nutmeg. Those bars seemed too sweet to me, perhaps too much monk fruit concentrate for my tastes? There are no artificial sweeteners, which is a plus. And the ingredients are stellar. Lots of whole nuts and seeds mixed in with the other ingredients. These are relatively small bars with only two grams of sugar but six grams of protein. There are 13 grams of carbs but ten of those grams are fiber, leaving 3 grams of net carbs.

You can get this information by reading the box but you can't get most of it by reading the product page because ingredients aren't listed and only some of the nutritional information is there. The individual bars do not have nutritional or ingredient lists either. That information is confined to labels on the larger box these bars come in. I'm vacillating between e3 and 4 stars, but going with 4 because the ingredients, once you find the list, are really good.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: 20 Piece Set of Assorted Color Party Bags, Paper Party Favor Bags, Colored Birthday Party Gift Bags, Perfect Colored Bags with Handles for Birthdays Other Parties! (Solid Color)
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text: These bags are bright and colorful, and well made.  The bags and the handles are both sturdy.  This set is of relatively small bags, about 8.5 x 6.5 x. 3".  For the package-wrapping-challenged, as I am, these bags and a bit of tissue make a really nice presentation.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: Lauon Mesh Food Cover is committed to providing consumers with good-quality products and services. Indeed, mosquitoes and flies can smudge our food and spread disease. Now our food cover tent help you protect your food safely. Enjoy your healthy life.
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text: These are handy little gadgets, lightweight and practical.  It's good they come in a 6-pack because I destroyed my first one.  I tried to open from inside, and it opened okay but would not collapse again.  It turns out you are supposed to pull the string on top, and the whole thing pops open.  Whodathunk?  Obviously, not this mechanically challenged person.  Despite that, the 5 remaining ones are very useful, and I now know something new.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: Notebook Black, A5 Journal, Large Hardback, 296pp | 80gsm | Black 8.4 x 5.7 inches
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text:
If you want a permanent or semi-permanent journal for any reason, but you don't want it to be covered in butterflies or skulls, this is a very nice, sturdy journal. The paper is an ivory color, tending toward a bit yellow, and the markings are a medium rusty brown. There is "Date Page" at the top of each page, which you can use or ignore, depending on how you want to use the journal. It is lined, and the top and bottom lines are a little bit darker than the ones between, with tiny marks that can be used for paragraph or column/tab guides.

The book doesn't lie completely flat when you open it, but it's still easy enough to write, but you might need to anchor the page with your wrist as you write. The paper is matte so it accepts a variety of inks.

This isn't the type of journal where you can rip out a page or two and expect it to go unnoticed, so if you use this to write nefarious plans that you don't want seen or reveal that you sneaked out 4 times this week, you're gonna have to swallow the whole book.

The ribbon is a nice touch, but not quite nice enough. It's quite thin, but it's also not quite long enough. I want a ribbon I can pull out of the book and mark my new place without having to open to the old page, and this isn't long enough. Still, it's a nice, sturdy book. Whether it is a good value, you'll have to judge for yourself. There is no current price listed at the time this review is being written.

AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.product_description: ShinePick PS4 Gaming Headset 3.5mm Wired Bass Stereo Noise Isolation Gaming Headphone with Mic & LED Lights for Xbox one, Playstation 4, Laptop, PC(Green)
AE6TDCUOKCSCRL5ZHWKEL7QHOA3A.review_text: I'm not a gamer but I got these headphones for online language lessons where a microphone is needed.  I'm really impressed by these headphones, especially at the price point.  The sound is quite good on them, with nice bass.  And they are very comfortable, except that every over-the-ear headphone I've tried does make my ears feel warm.  I previously bought some other headphones for my language lessons for about the same price as these, and this set is much better than the previous one I got.  And they are pretty cute, too.  Great for gaming kids, but also great for those of us who need headphones with a mic.
