AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Wildcrafted Chagajit - Organic Blend of Shilajit Powder & Chaga Mushrooms Powder - by Holistic Bin | Nootropic Supplement for Mushroom Tea or Coffee | Rich in Fulvic Minerals (50g)
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: Seems like an above average strength Shilajit. It will take more time to know if it has the health effects. I just use a half tsp in tea each day during high immune system demands. I like the flavor and it seems to be a good product and a good value. It arrived vary nicely packaged in a blue foil pouch with a wooden scoop.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Arctic Flex Ice Face Roller - Face Roller Skin Care Tools - Eye Puffiness Relief Massager Beauty Products - Migraine, Wrinkles, Neck, Chin, Jawline, Sensitive Skin, Acne & Scar Treatment - Women, Men
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: This ice roller is priced right, feels great and works very well. I am really enjoying it. I get migraines and trigeminal neuralgia. I just happened to have a migraine yesterday morning and this morning, so I was actually able to test this out, unfortunately. It feels great when you are feeling well but during a pain crisis it's a relief.  This is just one way to isolate a painful area with targeted cold pressure delivery that works. Changing things up helps also, and I do need to try different things, different temperatures, pressure and tools. This smooth, light weight ice roller is completely different for me and I'm glad to have it. Sore shoulders, and the nerve pain that runs down my neck and into my clavicle and shoulder blades, I just roll where ever I feel the nerves flare up, even my jaw, cheek bones and forehead, occipital etc. Good value and worth a try if you have nerve pain or other issues with pain.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Keto IV Electrolyte Drops + High Potassium | No Leak Dropper Bottle | 500mg Potassium + Magnesium, Sodium & Zinc | Hint of Raspberry | 30 Servings
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: I like it, it's simple and easy to add to my water bottle. I am constantly concerned with my mineral and electrolyte levels because I have body aches and migraines, cluster and other headaches. It's a lifelong problem, but I can do somethings to improve my situation, one is to drink plenty of water and stay hydrated by drinking water that is purified and enhanced. I love these drops. The water tastes fresh and clean. I shake the container and put five  drops in my water carafe.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Herb Essential Pure Haritaki Powder - 100 g
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text:
It'll take some time to see results, but I just want to say that it seems like a great value for bulk powder. The quality seems very good, fresh, strong. The flavor is slightly bitter, earthy and numbs the tongue a little. Pale colored powder, slightly yellowish, tan. Fine powder but has a grainy texture, sandy as well.

I have chosen to take it, 750 mg at a time mixed in honey water, hot. Just a couple of ounces of water, 1 stp of honey and 750 mgs of powder. Two times a day for long term health effects. I'll check back in a month or two with results. So far I have not had any side effects or undesirable stomach issues. My aim is over all reduction in inflammation, maybe some brain happiness /fitness, and longevity/energy. That's a lot to expect but as a bitter herb, this should be a good supplement. No jittery effects so far. The taste is strong, you can't cover it up. If you don't like bitter, earthy flavors, get capsules or encapsulate so you can avoid the flavor and be comfortable. I don't mind this flavor, and only drink a small amount of liquid with the powder, and it's not hard to swallow or so bad tasting that it was difficult. Herb Essential Haritaki Powder, 100g, It's a Good value, fresh, strong product, seems good quality and authentic. I will update with results in 4 to 8 weeks.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: AlkaHydra Alkaline Water with Coral Calcium – 60 Sachets - 960 Glasses
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: The sachets are easy to use. I put one in the lower tank of my Berkey system and it helps to add back in minerals and alkalizes the water as well. I use the water for drinking, making coffee and tea etc. I don't have long term health effects to report but hope that this will make a noticeable difference in time. For now, it's easy to to use and seems like a great product. I'll update since I am working out pain issues in my hip and neck. I use this along with other supplements and diets, but I know I wanted to address my Berkey water to make it healthier for me and I hope this helps.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Herb Essential Moringa Powder (Wild Grown) - 100 g
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: This moringa is a good quality, authentic and packaged well. It's a bit pricey for the quantity, but if you aren't sure you'll like it, it's a good try out size package. I love it, I put it in my smoothies and feel as though it really increases the nutrient value and the over-all health effects of the smoothie. It's flavorful, not too bitter but I add a little stevia to my smoothies anyway because I put lemon and salt in there too, so that can be awful without some sweat.  If you stir it right into warm tea or something, it doesn't blend easily but in a blender, in s smoothie it's mixed in easily. You can put it in tea or capsules. I love moringa. Great sustained energy.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: Pacific PPE 2Pack Household Glove Mixed Package Reusable Cleaning Dishwashing Gloves-Latex Free Waterproof PVC Gloves for Kitchen,Gardening Gloves Unlined and Flocked with Cotton Liner(Yellow&Green,M?
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: The mediums fit as expected. Palm fatigue is minimal, and the non flocked and flocked are both comfortable. The solid color is a more traditional dishwashing glove, flocked and thick. The two color glove it more of a light weight, non flocked glove. Both are of a good shape, the cuff is long enough for regular cleaning, protect the hands and keep water from dripping into the glove. Good quality and no offensive odor to the material at all.

AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.product_description: PACIFIC PPE 4 Pack Household Glove Mixed Package Reusable Cleaning Dishwashing Gloves-Latex Free Waterproof PVC Gloves for Kitchen,Gardening Gloves Unlined and Flocked with Cotton Liner(Pink&Blue,L)
AH5PGJYVXBFVRXAFSTA7AEH4EXRQ.review_text: The thing I notice with a good protective glove, is whether they feel good on the hand and fit well. I find that some gloves may be strong and long lasting, but if they don't cover the hand correctly they pull and stretch against the movement of your hand as you work and that is tiring, and causes my hand to get tired and sore. These gloves are all the same size and fit but different colors. The fit is loose on me, I would normally wear a Medium, but these are Large. The sleeve come to mid forearm. The back of the hand and wrist are baggy but across the palm, when I open my hand there is a tight pull across the palm from the small finger to the thumb. This is tiring. I would be nice if the entire glove, including the inner palm size fit better.  The material seems good, soft.  The tips of the fingers are roomy also for big fingers.

AFGGRGHGHSFKMZASFBYFRHBBEOPA.product_description: Keratin Secrets Do It Yourself Home Keratin System
AFGGRGHGHSFKMZASFBYFRHBBEOPA.review_text: I used the product without paying attention to the ingredients.  It did not even perform as well as I had hoped.  I am too fearful to give it a second attempt given the ingredients.

AFGGRGHGHSFKMZASFBYFRHBBEOPA.product_description: FASCY LAB GREEN+ Korean Sunscreen — SPF 50+PA++++, Daily Facial Sunscreen, Sun Cream With Patented Ingredients, Korean Spf, Korean Sun Cream for Face — Paraben Free [1 x 1.69 Fl.Oz.]

It does leave behind a slightly dewy appearance and is not matte.  No white cast as seen with thicker formulas.  This feels very moisturizing without feeling heavy.  Blends very well into the skin and has a very mild scent.  Bottle is easy to use and to dispense product.  Great sunscreen

AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.product_description: Women Ultra Smooth Razor Womens Razors for Shaving Comfortable handle 5-blade Razor + 2 Refill Blades for a Smooth and safety Shave Reusable Razors for Girls Women
AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.review_text:
This is a very straight forward razor with a stand up holder that uses a very low power magnet to keep the razor in place.

The razor itself is nothing fancy and I have been using it for about four days. I have not had any issues. The handle is a little awkward to hold when it gets soapy, but it is not a deal breaker. I do like the stand up holder because then the razor is standing and out of the way. I do wish the magnet was a little stronger.

There is one replacement blade, but apparently after that you have to buy a new kit. I could not find replacement blades for sale anywhere on Amazon.

AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.product_description: Ultra Dark Self Tanning Lotion for Face and Body - With Manuka Honey & Vitamin E - Instant Glow Sunless Tanner - Natural Looking Sun Tan for Medium, Fair skin Tone - Organic Skin Care Moisturizer (8oz)
AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.review_text:
This is an instant tanner. It leaves color where you put it and then even though I was expecting more to develop, it absolutely did not. The color that I applied was the color that was there. I put the lotion on at about 7 am when I got up in the morning with a lotion applying glove because other reviewers stated the lotion left stains on their hands. At about 6 pm when I took a shower I noticed a lot of the lotion simply washed off.

I suppose if you want a temporary tan for an evening out, this lotion would be a perfect solution. It does dry easily and smells quite nice. It is easy to apply, with a mitt, if you pay attention. Like I said, the color does not develop. I am not sure I would use it on my face.

AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.product_description: Tirtyl Hand Soap Sheet Variety Pack - 240 Pack with Portable Storage Tin - Camping/Outdoor/Travel/Handbag - Lavender & Aloe - Bergamot & Ylang Ylang - Jasmine & Patchouli
AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.review_text:
We do not get out a lot, but I do go to a lot of doctors' appointments and hospitals and there is nothing I hate more than hospital soap. It is abrasive and it has a scent that is so distinct and it sticks with you for hours and hours after you have washed your hands. I loathe hospital soap.

These little soap sheets are simply amazing. Not only do they pack light - I can stick one little tin in my bag and it takes up almost no space at all, but the sheets themselves are tiny. The sheets dissolve nearly instantly in water, lather perfectly and the smell so nice. They are like a little bathroom oasis at the doctor or hospital. The scent does not linger though, so please do not be worried about smelling like ylang ylang for hours on end.

My hands always feel clean when I leave the bathroom and I have even used a sheet to wet a paper towel and wipe my face off.

AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.product_description: Organic Self Tanner for Face and Body - Streak Free Sunless Tanner - Self Tanning Lotion with Manuka Honey and Aloe Vera - Fake Tan for Fair to Medium Skin - Indoor Tanning Lotion with Bronzer (8oz)
AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.review_text:
As a 42 year old woman with shockingly pale skin I thought it would be interesting to try a sunless tanner. When I was younger I used Jergens sunless tanner and unless I was extremely careful and diligent I ended up orange, streaked or some combination of the two. I did not have high hopes for this sunless tanner, so I started with a small area on one leg.

First, this lotion does not have any real scent straight out of the bottle, but it does have a smell that develops once it is on the skin. It is not unpleasant and maybe the scent is dependent on the person, but it is there. Second, it is easy to apply. The first application I only put a tiny amount on my right leg and then immediately washed my hands. I let it dry for about one minute and then got dressed. Simple. Third, it takes a bit for color to appear. I started to tan in about 12 hours and by the next morning I was noticeably browner.

The second application I put on both my legs just like normal lotion. I tried paying attention to my knees and ankles, but honestly, I did not really. I washed my hands immediately, but must have brushed my forearm. I let everything dry for about one minute and then got dressed. The next morning I was tan and had a streak of brown on my arm.

I like this stuff. It is easy to use and the color lasts. My super pale skin accepts the color and I don't look nearly as translucent.

I am sort of a lavender lotion expert. I love the stuff. Most lotions that have lavender either smell like nothing or smell like an entire shop of flowers. Those lotions that do get the scent right usually are full of chemicals.

I had never heard of Kneipp before but I really like it. This lotion is not thin, but if you are used to a thick cream it will seem thinner. It does take a little work to absorb, but it is worth it. The scent is not overpowering and I think it does not linger, but is just right.

One complaint I do have is that the bottle had no safety seal. For $18 I would think the tube would come with a seal on the top. I was not sure if the bottle had already been used and returned. I just decided to go ahead and be brave and I'm still alive. Kneipp needs to add a seal on their tubes.

This is not a sticky or overwhelming lotion and does not leave your skin feeling greasy. Sometimes paying a little more for a product that really works is worth it and this is one of those times.

AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.product_description: Nu-Pore Facial Sheet Mask Packaged Holiday Shippable Gift Set Aloe Vera Pomegranate Hibiscus Green Tea Lavender Cucumber 12 K-Beauty Sheets Perfect for Home Spa Treatment gifts Made in South Korea
AGADKXWLAJJ4FGWIDIWAPJL5A6HA.review_text:
First, these are your typical sheet masks. They have normal directions - wash your face, apply, wait 15 to 20 minutes, remove. Simple.

These masks are however a little different in that they come packaged in a lovely little box, wrapped in tissue paper and would be the perfect gift to send someone. There are 12 masks, including two panda masks(!)

I like that there are a couple of each mask which will make it possible for both my husband and I to do a mask together.

We already did the panda mask and the scent was not overpowering. There is a lot of liquid for the skin to absorb in each packet and we did notice some dripping. This was solved by simply wiping the extra off with a washcloth. We did not rub in all the extra to our faces because it would not have been possible. The masks did not improve our faces to the point where we were amazed, but they were cooling while they were on and it was a fun Saturday, movie night thing to do.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: MRTREUP Chrome Nail Powder Palette , Metallic Mirror Effect Chrome Powder for Nails , Rose Gold Sliver Pink Holographic Nail Glitter Nail Pigment Powder for DIY Salon Nail Art Decorations
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I love how easy these are to use, the packaging is reminiscent of eye shadow including the applicator brush.  It is pretty easy to rub on and shin on my top coat and looks fantastic.  I make sure to apply the top coat right before applying the chrome.  After the chrome I apply a top coat twice that extends a little further than the chrome to help it stay on.  It lasts a couple days before it starts to chip on the nails I use the most.  I know I put a lot of wear on my nails but I am still sad it doesn't last longer.  I have tried a couple brands of polish and still have the chipping problem.  I am going to try other designs that doesn't have chrome near the tips and I expect that to last much longer.  I have recieved lots of compliments on my nails and I do love how the chrome looks.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil Pure Butter infused with Tea Tree Oil, 4 Oz
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: This smells like Castor oil and tea tree, no surprise there.  It is very heavy so it can weigh down hair and make it greasy and feel greasy on dry skin.  I found taking a little in my hands and rubbing vigorously before applying to warm it up helps to not use too much.  I try to melt it really good in my hands first.  It can be challenging to wash off, so use a small amount and heat it up well with your hands to get the thinnest layer possible for best results.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: mold remover gel (3 Pack)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I wore gloves to apply this because I have sensitive skin.  It was pretty easy to apply and I made sure to do so liberally.  I waited several hours before scrubbing it off and it worked quite well.  I found it easy to open and easy to apply. I did leave the fan on in the bathroom to remove odor.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: 8PC Lazy Bird's Nest Plate Hairpin Velvet Bird Nest Shaped Hair Clips Expandable Ponytail Holder Hair Loops Nest Plate Hairpin Hair Claw Clip barrette
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: If you can get past the prongs on the inside I love these because they don't crimp my hair like a hair tie and are much more gentle on my hair.  It's so easy to use these to make a volume pony or even messy bun style.  I am still trying new hair styles.  I have fine hair which these are fantastic for!

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Premium Taza Natural Moroccan Argan Oil Rosemary Lavender Conditioner, 16 fl oz (473 ml) ♦ For Healthy, Smooth, Silky Hair ♦ Contains: Moroccan Argan Oil, Broccoli Seed Oil, Pro Vitamin B5, Hydrolyzed
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I opened the bottle and noticed the product only comes up to the shoulder of the bottle which I found strange.  The bottle is sealed under the cap and has a plastic wrap on the outside of the top.  I noticed the smell right away, I really like the rosemary smell.  It felt nice in my hands and I went to distribute it in my hair  it took a lot more product than I usually use and my hair didn't feel silky like it usually does.  I really didn't like the way my hair felt when I applied it.  Once dry it doesn't weigh down my soft fine waves and still has a little of the conditioner smell which I enjoyed.  I don't think my hair is significantly less frizzy than when I use the products I usually use but my hair does seem less weighed down.  I am still on the fence on this one, maybe with more regular use I will like it more.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: ANGNYA 6Pcs Nail Art Brushes Set Gel Nail Polish Design Pen Painting Tools With Nail Extension Gel Brushs,Builder Gel Brush,Nail Art Liner Brush for Salon at Home DIY Manicure(Pink)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: These brushes work really well.  The bristles were very stiff until the first use.  They come with covers to protect the bristles.  I noticed each had some bristles that were longer than the rest so I had to cut them down.  The handles are decent and long enough to get good manipulation.  I was able to do some fun designs on my nails with my gel polish.  I also like the variety that comes in this pack so I can find the right shaped brush for what I am trying to do.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Unicorn Snot Lightning Drops - Liquid Highlighter & Bronzer Makeup - Face, Eyeshadow, Body Shimmer & Glitter - Cruelty Free (DIVA)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I really like show sheer this unicorn snot is but it layers well for a more saturated look.  It adds a nice sheer highlight but also makes a pretty eye shadow.  I have trouble getting the product out which is really frustrating.  I've tried shaking it, tapping it on my skin etc.  Hopefully with more experience I can get better at applying these unicorn drops.  I got the Diva.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: KISSNOWY Manga Lashes Natural Look , Single Individual Lashes Wispy Cluster Lashes Extension for Cosplay Japanese Anime Makeup False Lashes (F-01)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: These are on the dramatic side for me but not the most dramatic ones I've used.  They are reusable and more comfortable than I expected to wear.  They do not come with eyelash glue.  They come staged on thin white plastic that I use to store them.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is designed exclusively for teens, tweens, pre teens, and boys and girls to work as an effective, yet gentle body wash. Natural ingredients like Allantoin and Bisabolol nourish beyond surface level, and penetrate into the lower levels of the skin for the deepest hydration possible, while active ingredient tea tree oil works to fight body acne and skin issues teens are commonly prone to. Unlike shower bars and other soaps, our products are designed to soothe problematic and compromised skin. With 100% Natural ingredients that are paraben, sulfate, fragrance, and gluten free, the Kidskin Foaming Body Wash with Tea Tree Oil is gentle enough for every day use. Our mission is to provide teens (like our own!) with a body wash that leaves them feeling fresh and confident so they can focus on what really matters- every day. Ingredients: Water (Aqua), Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Disodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Musa Sapientum (Banana) Extract, Polysorbate-20, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, ^ Glycerin, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil, Sea Salt (Sodium Chloride), Tetrasodium EDTA, Citric Acid, Allantoin, Bisabolol
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: This really helped with the acne on my back and left my skin feeling smooth and healthy. It foams out of the pump with the amount I need for a single use.  I keep the cap on it when I am not using it to keep it clean.  So far it is lasting well and I have been using it for several weeks as a daily wash.  It does not dry my skin out.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Swiss Botany Pueraria Mirifica Breast Lifters for Women - Breast Enlargement Serum with Pure Pueraria Mirifica Oil for Breast Firming, Lifting and Fuller, Bigger Breast - Large 2oz Bottle
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text:
Between breastfeeding and weightloss my breasts are saggy and not full. It's been a hard adjustment. I know no cream or non surgical option will give me results like surgery would. The cooper's ligaments once stretched will not suddenly retract from a serum.
This serum is light and easy to apply. It does not irritate my sensitive skin and leaves it moisturized. I also use a hyaluronic serum.
That being said I have noticed a small improvement. They look a little fuller, not a measurable difference but to my eye they look a little less sad. This in theory increases estrogen activity locally to increase the fullness of the breast tissue. This will not replace a surgical breast lift but for minor changes it works for me.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer for DIY Lip Gloss Make Your Own Lip Gloss DIY Handmade Lip Gloss Glaze Gel Waterproof Non-Stick Cup 50/80ML
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: The volume is accurate to the ad for the lipgloss base.  It works well, I mix with Shae butter, vitamin e and pigment.  It is a good volume for my daughter and I to make homemade lipgloss but if making gifts or anything more than a handful of tunes this is a small volume.  Mine did not come with the non stick bowl the ad mentions.  It seems a little pricey but works well and my sensitive skin does not react to it.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: EZ Detangler Brush, Morgles 2 Pack Detangling Brush for Curly Hair Ez Hair Detangling Brush for Afro America/ African Hair 3a to 4c Wavy Hair
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: Really easy to use brush that is great for all hair types.  My daughter has curly hair and this brush makes it so much easier to brush her hair.  She is more willing to sit for me to brush and style her hair and doesn't complain.  Then she attempts to brush my hair (still developing that skill).

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Household Mold Remover Gel, Grout Cleaner for Washing Machine Strips, Refrigerator Strips, Tiles, Grout Sealant Bathroom Home Kitchen Sinks Stain Cleaning
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: This gel has a good consistency which makes it easy to apply to surfaces.  You should definitely use gloves when handing it.  I left it on for over three hours and didn't see the mold disappear like I was expecting.  It was lighter in places but not as effective as I had hoped.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: USUIE Red Light Therapy Belt, Infrared Light
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: The directions are easy enough to follow.  It comes nicely packaged with several straps to help secure it in your desired area.  It has several modes which can be disconcerted by the color of the 'M' button.  Pressing the M button changes the modes.  You can plug it into a wall block, laptop or even a backup battery block.  The LED are red to my eye but I don't have anything to measure wavelengths.  It comes with a pocket for a battery but does not come with one.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Womens Daily Multivitamin Gummies (60 Gummies, 30-Day Supply) Biotin, Folate, Inositol, Vitamin C, D3, B5/6/12, & Zinc for Immune Support*, Energy*, Hormone Balance*, Hair Skin & Nails* - Gluten-Free
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: Absolutely delicious!  No aftertaste either.  Reminds me of the strawberry chew candies at the convenience store.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: ULTREMA Red Light Therapy, 5-in-1, Red Light Therapy Device for Joints Pain Relief & Anti-inflammatory, 660nm Red and 850nm NIR Five-Chip Combo
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I am not sure how well this works as I do not have a way to measure its claims.  That being said it clearly emits a strong red light that is visible and likely emits the near IR light it claims to.  IT is easy to assemble and use and I love that it is rechargeable.  It does come with safety glasses I recommend using to protect your eyes, even when using for short periods.  There is also a bendable tripod that is easy to adjust and aim at almost any direction.  There is also a charging cord but not brick so you will need a USB slot to plug it into.  The small size makes it very portable as well.  The presentation is very nice with a sturdy box with interior slots for the pieces.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Viu Nutrition Marine Collagen Gummies - 60 Daily Hair Skin and Nails Gummies – Fast-Absorbing, Chewy, Delicious, Non-GMO - Type 1 Premium Marine Collagen Pills – Collagen Supplements for Men & Women
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: These gummies come sealed and are fresh and squishy.  I actually like the taste and look forward to eating the 2 gummie serving each day.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: EYEKESHE Aromatherapy Shower Steamers Gifts for Women, Unique Gifts Shower Bombs with Pure Essential Oils for Birthday, Home Spa Stress Relief, Bathtub, Shower Melts and Self Care
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: These are a great way to make your shower more relaxing and more of a spa day.  They fizz and release a pleasant aroma but don't make a mess of my shower.  These come individually wrapped so they stay fresh and fragrant.  Get it a little wet and then set it somewhere outside the direct water stream so it lasts.  I don't have time for a relaxing bath so shower steamers are a great way to make my shower more relaxing.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Clear Probiotics Clear Gut Probiotic Supplement for Gut Health (30 caps) – 30 Billion CFUs for Gut Restore, Digestive Health and Immune Support – Shelf Stable, Non-GMO Adult Probiotics Capsules
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: Arrived sealed and fresh.  They don't have any weird after taste.  I am taking these to try to be healtheir but not sure how to tell if they are helping.  Easy to swallow.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Aspen Naturals Maca Root Powder - Organic, Raw, Gluten Free, Gelatinized Superfood, Keto and Vegan Friendly, Easily Add to Your Smoothies, Baking, Ice Cream, and Coffee. 30 Day Supply
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I love that this maca root comes in an easy to reseal bag.  I add it to my smoothies and it makes my smoothies taste better.  I think it helps my overall health but I am not a professional.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Cordless Electric Hair Straightener Curling Flat Iron with Floating Ceramic Plates & Adjustable Temp Portable for Travelling with USB Charging Cable
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text:
I got this for travel and expected it to perform like my corded one. I was disappointed. The small size means it fits in my purse and the pink is cute. It doesn't get as hot as the one I keep at home that is corded and I found I need the higher heat to get the results I want. It also has a small heat plate which I think also made it take longer. I thought the teeth would be helpful but I found it made the straightener get caught in my hair more. I like the charge lasts me several uses.
If the lower heat is sufficient for you and you don't mind the teeth the small size and rechargeable battery that lasts several uses is great.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: IT'S A NO-PRESSURE SITUATION. what is it? So Jelly™ are shock-absorbing insoles designed to help distribute and relieve pressure on your feet. what does it do? Two varieties of slim, high-grade, breathable silicone insoles release the pressure on the balls of your feet and toes. The first variety features a larger pillow, anti-slip massage dots and an adhesive bottom to reduce strain in shoes with a downward tilt (we're talking about you, high heels). A second variety provides lighter, more versatile cushion support and slip control for use with all other types of shoes. why is it the best? These durable, reusable and washable insoles mean you can experience all-day comfort, no matter what type of shoes you choose to wear. why will you love it? Because your comfort zone is a good place to be. HOW TO USE:Wipe the inside of shoes clean & allow to dry for optimal adhesion. Place insert into each shoe just below the ball of the foot and position to personal comfort. Remove plastic backing to activate the self-adhesive. Replace as needed as adhesive naturally wears off.
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: These a gel like consistency and feel like silicone.  They stay in place best in a clean, dry shoe.  Two of the pads have an extra arch support piece so I place these in the front and the others under my heel.  Overall I feel they greatly increase the comfort of my shoes.  The fact they are clear makes them much more versatile with my formal shoes.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: NATWAG Reusable Update Makeup Remover Cloths for Sensitive Skin - Microfiber Face Cloth Makeup Remover | Washable Round Makeup Remover Pads-Natura-Facia-Towels (8 Pads,4 Cloth) (Multicolor-Thicken)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I am big on Exfoliation. These cloths are so soft that they don't clean my face all the way and they don't get off my makeup all the way either. I have found they have some use if i put Micellar water on the small pad it cleans my eyes well without rubbing the delicate skin to hard but that's all i like them for. I would not recommend these.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Keto Powder goBHB Diet Supplement. Shake Powder Aimed to Boost Exogenous Ketones Performance. Perfect for Ketosis, Energy & Focus. Assists in The Breakdown of Fat. Peach Mango Flavor.
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I don't feel any different with this supplement it does not give me energy or more focus but it does taste good. I think someone might benefit from this more but for me it did nothing wouldn't buy again. Do your research first.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: ASYH Replacement Brush Heads, Compatible with Philips Sonicare Snap-On Electric Toothbrushes, Gum Care Tooth Brush Head 8 Pack
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: The OEM replacements are insanely expensive, but I get about 6 months out of them before my toothbrush tells me to replace the head.  With these, the clean is just as effective and the bristles are soft, but I find myself replacing them almost every month.  I give them 4 stars because they are a compromise between money and quality.

AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.product_description: Posture Corrector for Women & Men, Effective Medical Kyphosis Posture Trainer, Adjustable Upper Back Support Brace for Shoulder and Clavicle (S/M)
AEORT2SOUGKL76PYWWGS4SUL3OSA_1.review_text: I find it awkward to wear underneath clothing, so I wear it around my house, over my clothes. The trainer is easy to adjust, my wife and I both use it so need to readjust constantly. It does make you stand funny lol but maybe thats because our posture is bad so we definitely need this. I would recommend this to someone who has back pain, works at a desk, or sits for long periods of time.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Pulsar Gaming Gears - PK101 Nova Optical PRO eSports Level Hot Swappable Super Fast Optical Mechanical Gaming Keyboard - 0.1ms Lag Free Waterproof RGB Backlit USB 104 Keys (Blue Clicky Optical Switch)
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
This a fine keyboard.
Super smooth keys. You don’t need to much pressure on them.
Comfortable to use.
It is dust proof.
It is medium weight and was easy to set up and start using it.
My son is very happy with it for gaming.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Peripera Ink Mood Matte Lipstick, Lightweight, Matte, Smooth, Hydrating, Lasting Color Payoff (02 Pink Go Up)
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
I love this soft pink color. Perfect for a light makeup.
It run smoothly on the lips, I do use a primer before because I have very dry lips.
It last at least all morning and then all afternoon.
Even if the color is soft, the lipstick have a good pigmentation.
No weird scent.
I like it!
Recommended.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Oreola Fish Line Hair Extensions Real Human Hair Natural Black Wire Hair Extensions Straight Hairpiece for Women #1B 20inch 120G
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
This is a great option to the expensive hand tied extensions, plus you can put them in and off when you want.
The hair is soft and shinny, feel very good quality. It hold very good straightening or curling iron.
The weft has clippers so it can be more secure to the head. And the wire is adjustable to the size and shape of your head.
It is not extremely heavy, but you can feel it when you first put it on, but after a couple of hours you don’t even remember is there.
I saw quite a few videos to install it correctly and that made the difference so it can be completely invisible.
Comfortable to wear, the weft is not itchy.
The pack comes with the hair in a dust bag, a comb and a hair pin.
Recommended.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Veencys - Hair Straightening Treatment - Brazilian Keratin - Chocolate Treatment -Maximum Strength-Ideal for Moisturizing Eliminates Frizzy Hairs Smooth Hair 32oz (946 ml)
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
First, this treatment is profesional use… I can seee that because definitely I couldn’t do it by myself! It is not a simple or fast process.
The liquid has a very strong chocolate scent which I prefer over any more chemical scent.
You need to follow the instructions very well.
I have very thin, short natural wavy hair and I think we did something wrong along the way… hahaha…
Although my hair does feel softer and shinier. But I don’t have a “Brazilian straight”.
The liquid is chocolate also in color but I did not see any difference in my own hair. So it did not dye it.
Is a good product, and if you are like me, not super handy with brush and hair dryer, you better ask for help so you can follow through the steps.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: MU TENUTO Berceuse Water Gel Cream (2.36 fl. oz.) - Hypoallergenic Refreshing & Hydrating Facial Gel Cream with Natural Ingredients, Night Skin Care by Classical Music, Comfortable Lavender Fragrances
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
I wanted to love it, but i just can’t.
It smell good, it spread easily. You don’t need too much of it for the entire face. My skin did feel moisturized after using it BUT i just can’t stand the stickiness!!!! I tried with several amounts of it and i could not sleep at all because of the sticky feeling. It was too much. It did not absorb into my skin. Obviously every skin is different, mine is sensitive and dry.
The consistency is like a heavy gel.
So, for me is a BIG no, but i will use it during summer after sun tanning, before shower. I can see that would be best for me....i even think it will work great if i storage it in the fridge before using it... just like a cooling gel.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: SOFTACULOUS Foot Peeling Mask Booties – 2 Pairs, Baby Soft Skin in 7 Days
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
A couple of times during the year I get my heels very very dry.
I ordered this mask and it was great!
It start peeling around day 5-6.. and it was soo relaxing!!! Just like when I was little and we use glue on our hands! Haha..
Well, my feet are soft and almost all the dryness got out.
Easy to use.
No strong scent.
It did not make my skin red or itchy.
Love it! Recommended.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Claw Hair Clips, IKOCO 6 Pack Jaw Clips Stylish Matte Plastic Strong Hold Hair Clamps Box Packaged for Thin Fine Hair with 10Pcs Black Hair ties (2.4Inch)
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
This set comes in a plastic box, nice detail because you can use it for storage.
The clips are bigger than I was expecting, but they are perfect. I have very thin hair and medium length.
I like that they lie flat on my head. So they don’t hurt me if I’m using them for long periods of time.
Lightweight and well made. They feel sturdy.
The set also comes with hair ties, love them! Very soft. They are made on 1 piece of fabric which helps on the hair.
I really like this set.
Recommended.

AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.product_description: Argan Magic 100% Pure Argan Oil – Moisturizing Oil that Infuses Skin with Enriched Hydration | Leaves Skin Restored & Refreshed | Non-Greasy | Rich in Vitamin E | Made in USA | Cruelty Free (2 oz)
AG4TRGDHYIBT4CH63VJYM5IOAMTQ.review_text:
I was hoping more of this oil.
First it does not have any árgan type of scent... on the contrary it smells like fried oil. Not good. It is not super strong scent, but definitely you can smell it.
Second, it does not absorbe fast. I was oily until I fell asleep.
It was lightweight.
I did felt my skin hidrates the next day, but not quite sure if this is better than other oils that I use.
Definitely, I won’t use it, because mainly of the French fries smell.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: GERSHION Pastel Gel Nail Polish Set, 6 Colors Gel Polish Set, Soak Off UV Lamp Gel Polish Kit, Nude Pink Yellow Green Color Nail Polish Kit, 7.5ml Gel Polish Kit H-10
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
I have found with Gel polishes there are a few things you need to do to make it work.

Slow and steady.
Even light coats.
Dry really well between coats.
An excellent Base and Topcoat make all the difference.

This set works better, if you follow the steps above, but especially the top and base coat.
The colors can be a bit streaky, but I have found that light streaky coats with really drying them in between work better than one solid thick coat. It doesn't fully dry and will start to peel because of it.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: AIKIMUSE 10 Piece Nude Matte Pigmented Lipstick Set,Gifts for Women,Velvet Lip Kit Gift Set With Moisturizer Smooth,Waterproof Long Lasting Beauty Cosmetics Makeup Liquid Lipstick Set,8.8 oz
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
Not awful. Not perfect. Lots of gorgeous colors.

I found these drying- they were hard to put on, some of the colors are streaky, some can stain, the all-over emphasized my lip creases, drying so much that it feels like my lips are shrinking, and finally they all get goopy in the inner lip crease. Since I want to wear them all day, I don't feel like these hold up to my standard.

However, if you want a lot of colors, want short-time use, and just want to play, these are great.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: KISSIO Black Mascara,Double-ended Mascara,Mascara 2 in 1,Black Thick Mascara,Stereotype & Thick,Clear Roots,Effective for 12 hours,2 Step,1 Tube
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text: I just didn't like it. It doesn't make my lashes thicker, even with the bottom coat. I didn't think the comb was small enough to separate the lashes.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: Color Mascara for Eyelashes ,Colorful Mascara Set,Long Lasting, Denseness Makes the Eyes More Charming,Mascara Set for Eye Makeup(Pink)
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
I wish the color actually applied as vibrant as it shows. It didn't on my brown lashes, nor my daughter's blond.

There is a smell to this product, and it easily clumps.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: Pine Gel Nail Polish Set 6 Colors Purple Blue Cat Eye Glitter Gel Polish 7.5 ml Soak Off UV LED Cure Home Salon Manicure
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
I love the colors.
They are plastic feel- which I don't particularly love.
My issue is the magnet doesn't quite work with the polish. After using the colors on all 10 fingers, I only got one finger to have the cat-eye effect.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: CIMIY Gel Nail Polish Set 8 bottles - Manicure Colors Infinity with Top Base Coat for Forest Nail Art Natural Daily All Seasons for Nail Profession Salon and Starter at Home Soak Off UV LED 0.32oz
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
So the color I have is just a bit off than what it is shown. I did 3 thin coats of color.

That being said. The kit and quality are fantastic. I've been struggling with some of my recent Gel Polish's beings a bit rubbery and quickly peeling. These have not. They feel fantastic and wear fantastic as well.

They are smooth and as always with Gel, slow and steady with thin coats.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: Taya Beauty Buriti Nut Intensive Repair Shampoo & Conditioner Duo – Organic Hydrating Shampoo and Conditioner for Dry Damaged Hair - Restorative Hair Care – Travel Size 2 fl oz
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
This product smells lovely, but I was only able to get 3 uses out of it.

That is a bit too pricey for me to even want to consider repurchasing.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: Mr. Pristine Organic Beard Conditioner to Grow, Thicken, Moisturize and Protect Your Beard, 8.5 oz.
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text: This is a great product for beards and facial hair.  It helped to moisturize and freshen up stiff bristles and gives a fresh look.  The smell is ok but pretty mild if you want a stronger scent you may want to look at another product.  I recommend this product to anyone who has a problem with dry skin under a beard.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text: This product does a great job cleaning dry stiff beards.  It also does well moisturizing the skin underneath throughout the day.  Overall, I recommend this product for anyone with facial hair.

AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.product_description: Gel Nail Polish Set, Glitter 6 Colors Gel Polish Kit Popular Nail Art Design Soak Off LED Lamp Nail Polish Gel Manicure Kit Gifts Set for Girls Women Professional DIY Home Use
AGFLDIUYV2PKF5Q7IEMULR52GW2Q.review_text:
The color is fun and does require multiple coats if you want it completely covered, but I had some issues.

I'm not sure what went wrong. I did a base, then another gel polish solid color, then the glitter, and then topcoat.

Between the color and the glitter, they started to separate. I didn't see anything wrong with either set of ingredients. The glitter also, perhaps my coats weren't thin enough, but they would snag and tear easily. I had one nail that ripped the nail length off and into my skin when it snagged the get polish and tore.

After trying these my nails need some TLC before I experiment on which item was the issue in the overall process.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: Omega 3 Fish Oil Supplement 3600mg High DHA & EPA Natural Fatty Acids, Pure and Tested Wild-Caught Fish, Triple Strength Brain, Heart, and Joint Support, Burpless Subtle Lemon Flavor, 60 Softgels
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
Product: Built By Nature Omega 3 Fish Oil Supplement 3600mg High DHA & EPA Natural Fatty Acids, Pure and Tested Wild-Caught Fish, Triple Strength Brain, Heart, and Joint Support, Burpless Subtle Lemon Flavor, 60 Softgels

I really wanted to like these, and I had great hopes for them. Unfortunately, it didn’t work out that way.

First, these are NOT burpless. I was burping them up 1 out of 3 times taking them. That’s bad enough, but it is not an uncommon experience with fish oil supplements. The taste was just horrible, even for fish oil. Maybe it was the lemon flavoring, I don’t know. It was just worse than other fish oil I”ve burped up. I ended up not being able to finish the bottle, which is very unusual for me. I’ll usually go ahead with a moderately bad flavor. The expiration date for my bottle was good for about a year, so freshness shouldn’t have been the problem. This was with taking only 1 as a dose. I can’t imagine what it would have been like taking the recommended 3 per dose.

That 3 softgel dose is also higher than most fish oil supplements,which tend to be only 2. This means the bottle only lasts for 20 days, not a full month. It also means taking 3 large pills, which these are. I could swallow them, but they might be hard for anyone who has any difficulty swallowing pills.

The bottom line is these just didn’t work for me.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: Embroidered Tops for Women Casual Blouse Gift Set (as1, Alpha, one_Size, Regular, Regular, Flower)
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
This set of Flower Scented Bath Bombs (set of 16) is a nice set, especially for the number of bath bombs and the price ($19.99 May 2021). I use bath bombs almost everyday and tried many different brands with varying success. This set has enough positives that you can give it as a gift with confidence. They are definitely good for their price point and actually better than I expected.

They are pretty and have botanicals on the tops, although not as many as shown in the pictures. Still, they are pretty and I have no problem with them being displayed in the basket I keep on my bathroom countertop for easy access. They are on the large side, although not the largest I’ve used. This is good for me, since my tub is older and holds a fair amount of water. They are still able to give a relaxing bath.

They had a nice scent in the box. There are four different scents in the set. I can’t say I could identify the scent by just smelling them, but it is pleasant and definitely floral. The scent isn’t as strong once in the tub, but I do get a light fragrance during my bath. This is fine for me as I don’t like overwhelming scents.

They fizz okay and actually give a light layer of bubbles initially. The water color is nice. The colors are more muted than vibrant, but they are relaxing. I would say they are slightly above average for color and scent.

They do a fair job with moisturizing. I can feel the oils while in the tub, although the effect doesn’t last that long after the bath. They don’t make the tub too slippery. I’d give them 3+/4 in this area compared to other bath bombs I’ve used.

I haven’t had any problems with them staining or clean up after use.

I’m enjoying this set of bath bombs. It’s nice to have a set of 16. This isn’t typical to have this many, especially for bath bombs of this size.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: GreenFist Hydrogen Peroxide Ready to Use All Purpose (Glass, Carpet,Stain Remover) Cleaner (1 Gallon)
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
I have an older porcelain bathtub that has become more and more difficult to clean as it has gotten older. It probably needs to be resurfaced, but I’m not looking to do that anytime soon. I’ve tried all kinds of cleaning products and just haven’t gotten the results I wanted, even with a whole lot of elbow grease. While researching cleaning these older tubs, I consistently found peroxide was the recommended cleaner. So, I got GreenFist’s Hydrogen Peroxide All Purpose Cleaner Spray 32 oz (2 pack) as another attempt to clean the bathtub.

I like the idea of a more natural cleaner than the hasher cleaners (some of which I have tried). I sprayed the tub down really well and took the electric scrubber to it. While it didn’t handle all the stains, it did clean the tub better than anything else I’ve tried so far. Bonus, I didn’t need a nap afterwards from herculean scrubbing efforts.

The scent is fairly mild and has a somewhat citrus smell. It’s doesn’t leave a strong “fresh” scent like some cleaners, but I’m fine with that. The bathroom is small and I have to close the door when cleaning to keep the kitty from helping. Many cleaners can be overwhelming in the smaller, closed space.

I didn’t see an expiration date on the bottles. It’s my understanding that hydrogen peroxide degrades, particularly after opening the bottle. I have no way of knowing how “fresh” this is or how long the effectiveness will last. I was also surprised to see it in a clear bottle, as I always thought it came to opaque bottles to help preserve it. Maybe this is different from medical grade peroxide? I suppose I will just continue to use it as long as it is being effective.

I’m happy with the results for this product and will be trying it on other areas in the house.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: 18Pcs Bath Bomb Gift Set with Natural Essential Oils, Perfect for Moisturize Skin & Bubble Bath, Bath Bombs for Women ,Best Choice for Valentine's Day, Christmas, Mother's Day and Birthday Girls Kids
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
I use a bath bomb almost every day, so I’ve used many different brands. There are certain things I look for in the bath bombs I really like, though I don’t consider myself a bath bomb snob. There are just certain things I want from my bath bomb as an adult. For me, YULONG Lab’s 18 Pcs Bath Bomb Gift Set with Natural Essential Oils rates as an average bath bomb. I feel they are best for kids or just daily bath treatment for an adult who isn’t wanting that luxurious bath time.

These bath bombs are small in size. Now, that doesn’t mean they are necessarily not a good bath bomb. I’ve used small sized bath bombs that were actually quite nice. Unfortunately, that wasn’t the case with these. I have a large tub, so I will probably end up using two at a time, which it means I’m only going to get nine bath uses from the set.

The areas where I was disappointed with this set were fragrance and water color. There just wasn’t much fragrance to them, even in the box before they went into the water. I don’t like an overwhelming scent, but I do like more than I got with these. The second area was the water color. One bath bomb barely colored the water.

The packaging and the bath bombs themselves are pretty. They also fizzed...well they actually gave more bubbles than fizz. They actually did pretty good with the bubbles. They also made my skin nice and soft. They also didn’t stain the tub and cleaned up easily.

Overall, I’d have to say that these are average bath bombs. They have come down on the price (currently $19.99) which is more reflective of the type/quality of bath bombs. If you are looking for a luxury bath bomb, these aren’t the ones for you. But as a basic bath bomb, they hit the mark. There is certainly a place for this type of bath bomb. I would possibly gift these in certain situations.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: Spotlight Oral Care Toothpaste for Total Care | Prevents Cavities & Desensitizes Hypersensitivity | Vegan & Gluten-Free | Active Ingredients of Fluoride & Pentasodium Triphosphate | 100 mL/3.4 fl oz
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
Spotlight Oral Care Toothpaste for Total Care is packaged and priced like a higher end toothpaste, so I thought I would give it a try. Maybe I’m just used to toothpastes like Colgate, but this toothpaste has a strangeness factor to it that I haven’t adjusted to yet. I don’t hate it, but I don’t love it either.

The first thing I noticed is that it is thicker than any toothpaste I’ve ever used. I have to work at it to get just a little out of the tube onto my toothbrush. The consistency is somewhere between toothpaste and caulking. The second thing I noticed is that it doesn’t suds or lather much at all. I’ve never experienced that before. I wondered how well it could be cleaning without hardly any sudsing. If you are a messy brusher, this might be a plus. The third thing is the flavor. When they say mint flavor, they mean mint. I get the mint tingle through my whole mouth and lips. I’m talking about the Blistex tingle, not a mild tingle. It’s a bit too much for my tastes.

All that said, when I do finish with my rather unique brushing experience, my teeth do feel very clean, more so than with my regular toothpaste. The clean feeling also lasts longer. I do think this toothpaste is overpriced for one that doesn’t contain whiteners. It’s ingredients are aimed at cavity prevention and plaque buildup, which are basic toothpaste functions. While it seems to work at cleaning my teeth, I don’t think I would get this again.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: Bath Bombs Gift Set, Shea & Coco Butter Dry Skin Moisturize, Bubble & Spa Bath, Birthday Mothers Day Gifts idea for Men, Wife, Girlfriend, Kids (24 Bath Bombs)
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
I use a lot of bath bombs, almost everyday. I have to admit that I am a bit picky about them and look at several different areas. Lyskiycyn’s Handcraft Bath Bombs（XXL-5.7oz) ended up being about average for me. While they were okay in some areas, there were other areas they could use some improvement.

Presentation: The box itself is slightly above average. It’s fairly sturdy. The presentation of the bath bombs inside the box was nice. Aside from the ball bath bombs there are a couple different shapes, including a large heart with the word “Love” on it, that make the set a bit unique. The ball bath bombs had botanicals embedded on the top, which is always a nice touch. There were also several silk (?) flowers, which is definitely different. It was a pretty touch, although I’m not sure what I’m supposed to do with them. They do smell nice, so maybe use like a potpourri. Several of the bath bombs had areas that were crumbled however. The petals fell off some of the flowers while removing them from the box. For my own personal use, those aren’t really big deals, but it does drop the product down as something I’d want to use as a gift.

Scent: There is a nice scent when opening the box. The scent of the bath bomb in the water is only a fair plus. I can smell it, but just barely. The scents of all the bath bombs together nicely. I keep a basket on my countertop filled with bath bombs to use, so that’s important for me. They keep my bathroom smelling nice and fresh. I’d give them a fair for scent.

Fizz/Bubbles: These bath bombs leaned more towards bubbles than fizz. They do fizz, but the bubbles are more obvious and hide the fizz while they are dissolving. The bubbles didn’t last long past the bath bomb dissolving. I’d give them a fair plus on this one.

Moisturizing: This is a key area for me. The moisturizing effect was on the light side. I could tell there was an additive in the water, but I didn’t leave my bath feeling my skin was really soft and smooth. I got more good skin benefits from the soap I used. I’d give them a fair minus in this area.

Water Color: This is the least favorable area for these bath bombs. The water barely changed colors. I did not get pretty, relaxing colors for my bath water. I’d give them a poor in this area.

Clean Up: They did very well in this area. Cleaning the tub was a breeze. They didn’t leave the tub slippery or slick. They also didn’t stain the tub. Yes, I have had some bath bombs stain the tub, so this a potential big deal for me. I’d give them a good in this area.

Price: When I got these bath bombs, they were selling for $12.99. The current price, when writing this review, is $20.99. I feel the price of when I got them is more reflective of the quality of these bath bombs. At the current price, I’d be pretty disappointed since my expectations would be higher.

This is an average set of bath bombs that are probably more appropriate for children (except not really child themed) or teenagers. It proves that bigger isn’t always better.

AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.product_description: Sound Machine with Night Light, White Noise Machine for Sleeping Adults Baby Kids, 16 Soothing Sounds for Sleeping, Powered by USB, White Noise Maker for Bedroom Home White
AHR6ZSCEZPV5IIYAPOECIMWJMZEA.review_text:
I got the Swonuk Sound Machine with Night Light to replace my other sound machine that was getting finicky in its operation. I can’t sleep without white noise and my other machine would periodically suddenly stop, instantly waking me up.

Different people who use sound machines need different sounds. This sound machine has a lot of different sounds, so there should be a sound that works for most people. There are even three musical lullabies for babies. The volume has a good range and actually can be set quite loud. The machine will remember the last setting from the last use. I usually takes me a couple of nights to adjust to the differences in the sound with a new machine. For some reason, that was not the case with this machine.

It is also a night light with vivid colors that aren’t too bright. There is a dim and brighter setting for the white light. You can also have it automatically cycle through the colors. I use it when I have to get up in the middle of the night. I also use the colored lighting at times before I go to bed just for relaxation.

I always bring my sound machine with me when I travel. This machine is more compact than my previous machine and will travel well. Hopefully, that will be happening again soon.

The only issue I have with the unit is the controls are touch sensitive. There are no button or even raised areas to the ring with the controls. It’s very easy to brush up against the wrong control. It’s even harder at night if you are wanting to control the machine. I’ve hit the volume up when I was wanting to turn on the night light. Considering how loud the machine can get, it is quite jarring in the middle of the night.

Even with that, I have been unexpectedly happy with this sound machine. I guess I was expecting something “less” and it’s nice to be surprised in the positive direction.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: American Shaving Co Beard Wash with Sandalwood Scent, Jojoba Oil & Argan Oil, Soothing & Moisturizing Beard Care For All Types of Skin & Beard Hair, Softens and soothes the Beard itches, A Sandalwood scent infused Natural Beard Cream, 8 Oz

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Rated Green - Hibiscus Moisturizing Scalp Pack - Tube - 6.76 fl. oz. Cold Brewed Organic Hibiscus with Natural Honey - Softening Hair Mask for Women & Men

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Ultra Dark Self Tanning Lotion for Face and Body - With Manuka Honey & Vitamin E - Instant Glow Sunless Tanner - Natural Looking Sun Tan for Medium, Fair skin Tone - Organic Skin Care Moisturizer (8oz)
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: When I applied this I couldn't really see any color at all so it made it hard to know how to apply it evenly. I just applied it as a lotion and hoped for the best. I applied easily and spread smoothly so it felt like i was able to applying it evenly easily. My husband said that it looked like I wore flip flops out on a hike and got dirty. Definitely not the look I was hoping for so I was looking forward to it rinsing off when I showered. It didn't. At all. And it still hasn't 3 days later either. Ugh. This one is a hard pass for me.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: XXI Skin | Bio-Pure Vitamin C Lotion | Provides 24 Hours of Hydration | Minimizes Fine Lines, Daily Facial Moisturizer, 2 Fl Oz.
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: This is a thick creamy lotion that moisturizes very well and had my face looking fantastic with all my dry fine lines gone. However, after waiting an hour for it to fully absorb it still felt heavy and kind of greasy on my skin. I'm super picky and need moisture but hate the feeling of stuff on my skin, I prefer lightweight formulas that fully absorb and feel like there is no residue left behind. This one is a pass for me especially at the current list price of $48.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: CH.yishi Gua Sha Facial Tool - Natural Terahertz Stone for Face to Lift,Hyperthermia or ice therapy,Decrease Puffiness and Tighten
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text:
I ordered this because I was intrigued by the bumpy shape. I've tried a similar shape in stone and really liked it better than the traditional smooth edge, unfortunately this didn't live up to that stone tool. I usually prefer stainless steel as it has a heavier hand feel and can't shatter when I accidentally drop it. This tool was very light, and the shape wasn't carved, it was pinched/indented like this is made of a flimsy metal. I would guess maybe aluminum. I looked up Terahertzite mineral and found nothing, as it if doesn't exist, I could only find Terahertzite radiation/wavelengths. So to be honest I have NO idea what it is made of! It is also smaller than traditional gua sha tools which made it uncomfortable to hold in my hand and try to apply pressure to tight muscles with it.

Overall this is a hard pass for me and I suggest that it is for everyone else too.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: OSRSR Cryo Sticks,Unbreakable Stainless Steel Beauty Ice Facial Massage Tools for Woman,Skin Case Ice Globes Cryo Spoons,Cooling Globes Cold Globes for Face,Eyes & Neck

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: We have a 3 and a 6 year old both with ASD, they absolutely love these pillows and use them all the time. While our blue pillow arrived in perfect condition, unfortunately this one arrived with a big hole in one of the seams and the ASD has my daughter picking at things all the time so it's not possible for her to leave it alone and not make it worse. I just with that it was made better with better stitching and seams.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Glowa Sonic Facial Cleansing Brush with Gentle Exfoliating|Deep Cleansing|Mix Massaging 3 Acoustic Modes, Type-c Rechargeable, Waterproof,Includes Nylon and Silicone Brush Heads.
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: The bristles are super soft and it provides a nice deep clean. Current price is $35 which makes it a great value that I can recommend.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: AVCOO 4 Channel TENS EMS Unit 24 Modes Muscle Stimulator for Pain Relief Therapy, Electronic Pulse Massager Machine with 12 Pads, Dust-Proof Bag, Fastening Cable Ties.
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: This works great, easy to set up and operation is straight forward. Pads stick well and conduct the current nicely. No issues at all, it performs as expected and doesn't crush through power like crazy which is nice and important to me. The storage case makes it super easy to store and not lose any of the pieces.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: ChiroLux Curv | Cervical Neck Traction Device & Neck Posture Corrector. This Chiropractic Tool Is a Cervical Neck Wedge, Neck Curve Restorer & Cervical Traction Device For Neck Pain Relief
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: This is a really great tool, it is the exact style that my chiropractor tried to sell me but only costs half the price. I love how you can adjust the height to control how much pressure is put into your neck and it has a great shape to help get into the base of my neck.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: (3 pack) Zinc Gummies Immune Support Booster Chewable Dietary Supplements Immune Gummies Promote Growth Wound Healing Antioxidants - Zinc Gummies for Women Man Adults Teen Kids
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: All the info about these that I saw when I ordered these has disappeared by the time I received them. No current price is listed either. I had ordered them based on info listed and the bottles don't have the supplements the listing said it would. These only have Zinc. I'm really sketched out with this seller and these gummies so I'm going to be throwing them away instead of feeding them to my family. I expect this listing to disappear completely soon to be honest with you.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: (3 Packs) Vitamin D3 5000 IU Gummies
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: These are a HARD pass for us, they are advertised as "LUCKCHAN Vitamin D3 gummies are the first gummies that combine calcium, K2, zinc, and echinacea" however the ingredients listed on the bottle only say D3. These are currently priced at $22 for 3 bottles, $7.33 per bottle. These could be free and I would still highly recommend not eating these.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Adjustable Foam Roller Higher Density Deep Tissue Point Back Roller to Yoga Exercise Back Stretching Muscle Recovery Carry Foldable Roller to Travel Or Fitness with Bag for Man or Woman(Black).
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: The design of this is really cool how it collapses down and is smaller for packing and traveling purposes but I do want to point out that while it does get smaller it is also much heavier than typical foam rollers. Because of this I think it could be great for travelling by car or other means but not by airplane since you get charged for your baggage based on weight when flying. Personally we think this roller works fine but we don't find the plastic as comfortable as traditional foam rollers so we don't really reach for this one often.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Surhayy 40th Birthday Decorations for Men, Women, Her, Him, Funny Party Supplies, Toilet Paper, Perfect Bday Novelty Gag Gift
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: This is a really fun and funny gag gift, the print is on the paper well and the colors are vibrant. This is absolutely just a gag gift though and shouldn't actually be used as toilet paper. It is very rough and not absorbent. It could even make a great decoration if unrolled and hung up as streamers. Especially at the current price of $7 it is definitely worth it to me and I'm looking forward to using it for my brother's birthday soon.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Quench - 30 Island Ice Hydrating Electrolytes Rip Sticks | Energy and Intensity Maximizer | Whole-Body Hydration | 5g Packets
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text:
These are low calorie and low sugar but do contain sucralose, I would personally prefer normal sugar over sucralose. Also, the description on Amazon says that they have approximately the same amount of caffeine as a premium cup of coffee, but it doesn't actually disclose how much caffeine is in it, which I wish it did. I just like details personally.

Overall these do taste pretty good and they seem like a good deal at their current price of $10 for 30 packets.

AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.product_description: Facial Toner for Women and Men by IQ Natural - Vitamin C Toner for Face - Hydrating, Anti Aging Skin Toner for face- (8oz/236ml)
AE5IMGWRBJA7JQFBQTBK25HDYGVA.review_text: This was moisturizing (4.5/5) and absorbed fully leaving my skin soft and smooth without any residue, tackiness or greasy feelings. I really like this toner and think it's a great value at the current price of $18.
